description_long: This is a rectangular book with a predominantly blue background and a cover featuring a photographic image of a person lying on a bed, holding up a book. The cover is bordered by a blue area, and there is a white rectangular section below the main image, possibly for a blurb or additional text. The book appears to be a paperback, with a visible crease along the spine and slightly uneven edges, suggesting it has been handled. The spine is very thin, indicating a relatively short or compact volume. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on the central photographic cover image.
description: A compact paperback book with a blue-bordered cover featuring a photo of a person reading in bed and a white text section below. The book has a thin, slightly creased spine and a modern, clean appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is fully visible, showing the photographic image and white text section on a blue background.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thinness of the book and the blue color wrapping around the spine, with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, mirroring the blue background and white section, but the main image is reversed and less detailed.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and blue spine with no visible markings.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a photographic image of a person lying on a bed, holding a book above their head. The style is realistic and modern, with a focus on a cozy, domestic scene. The background is simple, emphasizing the subject.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is thin and blue, with no visible text or decorative elements. The design is plain and unadorned.
